A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly filtered businesses offering WiFi by only selecting attributes.WiFi equal to "u'free'" (and "u'yes'") in function-call-27594652728783421, omitting "u'paid'", which led to counting only five businesses and erroneously identifying FL (and its average rating) instead of the true top state PA.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
